zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Hepple於1310年出生在英國諾圖波藍德賀普爾時，她的父親Robert Heppall27歲，母親Cecily Chartney22歲。她於1329年3月28日之後與Robert de Ogle結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1365年3月19日在英國諾圖波藍德奧格爾 卡素享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hepple
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hepples
meanings: English: variant of Hepple with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Hepple was born in 1310, in Hepple, Northumberland, England, her father, Robert Heppall, was 27 and her mother, Cecily Chartney, was 22. She married Robert de Ogle after 28 March 1329. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 March 1365, in Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Hepple est née en 1310, à Hepple, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Heppall, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecily Chartney, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ogle après 28 mars 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 mars 1365, à Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Hepple 1310 in Hepple, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Heppall 27 und ihre Mutter Cecily Chartney 22. Sie hat nach 28. März 1329 Robert de Ogle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. März 1365 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Hepple è nata il nel 1310 nel Hepple, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Robert Heppall, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Cecily Chartney, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ogle dopo il 28 marzo 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 marzo 1365, nel Ogle Castle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Heppleが1310年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘップルで生まれた時，父Robert Heppallは27歳，母Cecily Chartneyは22歳であった。1329年3月28日以後にRobert de Ogleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1365年3月19日にイギリスノースウンバーランドオグル カストルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Hepple(이)가 1310년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤플에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Heppall(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Chartney(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1329년 3월 28일 이후 Robert de Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 3월 19일 영국 노르스벌랜드 오글 카스틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Hepple nasceu em 1310, em Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Heppall, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Chartney, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ogle após 28 de março de 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de março de 1365, em Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Hepple родилась в 1310 г. в местности хеппл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Heppall было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Chartney, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ogle после 28 марта 1329 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 марта 1365 г. в местности огл кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Hepple nació en 1310, en Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Heppall, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Cecily Chartney, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert de Ogle después de 28 de marzo de 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1365, en Ogle Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
